leak_notes: LEAK-FREE: hidden rows TVT (TVT column in train_base) is NOT used in payload construction. pf_build_payload only reads: TVT_input (known rows only), GR (all rows via interpolation), typewell GR-TVT profile. The TVT column is only merged AFTER prediction for RMSE evaluation. is_target rows are selected by is_known_tvt==False, which is derived from TVT_input being NaN, not from the TVT column. GR interpolation across all rows uses positional GR values (no TVT). pos = last_tvt + last_Z uses last KNOWN TVT_input (anchor), not hidden TVT.
